title: Update tests tree to mirror new namespace structure
acceptance_criteria: tests/Layout/ directory created mirroring src/Layout/ with Grid/, Tile/, Boxer/, RatioGrid/ subdirectories
tests/Components/ directory created mirroring src/Components/ with all subdirectories
tests/Plot/ directory created mirroring src/Plot/ with Braille/, Canvas/, Chart/, Graph/ subdirectories
tests/Module/, tests/Registry/, tests/Plugin/, tests/Modules/, tests/Events/, tests/Keys/, tests/Position/, tests/Output/, tests/State/ directories created
All test files moved to appropriate new locations
All use statements in test files updated to new namespaces
All test file namespaces updated (SugarCraft\Dash\Tests\Grid\ → appropriate new namespace)
All tests pass with new structure

notes.test_namespace_changes: Test namespace changes from SugarCraft\Dash\Tests\Grid\ to SugarCraft\Dash\Tests\Foundation\, Tests\Layout\, Tests\Components\, etc.
notes.use_statement_updates: Every test file that imports Grid classes needs use statement updated. Example: 'use SugarCraft\Dash\Grid\Modal' becomes 'use SugarCraft\Dash\Components\Modal'
notes.run_tests: After move: cd sugar-dash && composer dump-autoload && vendor/bin/phpunit
